chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5365 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.22957/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Nadir Khan Burdi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. The present petition seeks following relief: “i. Declare that Petitioner society is working in accordance with law and without any notice or hearing it cannot be superseded without due course of law. ii. Declare that Respondent No.3 and Respondent No.2 are not entitled for any action without due course of law. iii. Declare that Respondent No.2 and Respondent No.3 are entitled to interfere into affairs of Society or enquire into the matter as FIA is already seized with jurisdiction and matter pertaining to Cooperative Societies in the light of order of Hon’ble Supreme Court, as also, Anti-Corruption having closed enquiry against Petitioner Society. iv. To prohibit Respondent No.3 and other Respondents from taking any adverse or coercive action against Petitioner Society including superseding etc. v. Any other relief or relieves which in the given facts and circumstances this Hon’ble Court may deem fit.” Learned counsel remains unable to assist as to how declaration with respect to private party could be given by this court in exercise of writ jurisdiction and even otherwise how can the functioning of official respondent be restrained by us. In view hereof, present petition being misconceived is dismissed.

Any other relief or relieves which in the given facts and circumstances this Hon’ble Court may deem fit.” Learned counsel remains unable to assist as to how declaration with respect to private party could be given by this court in exercise of writ jurisdiction and even otherwise how can the functioning of official respondent be restrained by us. In view hereof, present petition being misconceived is dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
